channel.title: Robotics on James Akl
channel.description: Recent content in Robotics on James Akl

item.title: Robot Control Simulations
item.description: Three popular control schemes are formulated and simulated. This page summarizes the main ideas, detailed treatments are in the PDFs (with accompanying Simulink implementations) linked under the section titles. State Observer & Feedback Control PDF · Simulink A linear state observer is designed, specifically a Luenberger observer of the form: $$ \begin{dcases} \dot{\hat{\mathrm{x}}}=\mathrm{A} \hat{\mathrm{x}}+\mathrm{B} \mathbf{u}+\mathrm{L}(\mathbf{y}-\hat{\mathbf{y}}) \\ \hat{\mathbf{y}}=\mathrm{Cx} \end{dcases} $$ The observer gain matrix $\mathrm{L}$ is to be designed. The state matrix $\mathrm{A}$, input matrix $\mathrm{B}$, and output matrix $\mathrm{C}$ come from the LTI system, $$ \begin{dcases} \dot{\mathbf{x}}=\mathrm{A} \mathbf{x}+\mathrm{B} \mathbf{u} \\ \mathbf{y}=\mathrm{Cx} \end{dcases} $$ The feedforward matrix $\mathrm{D}$ is assumed null.
